EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} was failed to be authorized when pushing changes to the repository {object.storage.fullpath} of the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} was failed to be authorized when pushing changes to the repository {object.fullpath} of the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} was authorized when pushing changes to the repository {object.fullpath} of the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} was authorized when pushing changes to the repository {object.storage.fullpath} of the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} was failed to be authorized when downloading the repository "{object.name}" of the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} was authorized when downloading the repository "{object.name}" of the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
